ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image */,
  "image_type" INTEGER /* Type of image (e.g., handwritten, printed, symbol) */,
  "image_format" INTEGER /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG, GIF) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the image in pixels */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the image in pixels */,
  "eccen" REAL /* Eccentricity of the image */,
  "p_black" REAL /* Percentage of black pixels in the image */,
  "p_and" REAL /* Percentage of black and white pixels in the image */,
  "mean_tr" REAL /* Mean transformation of the image */,
  "blackpix" INTEGER /* Number of black pixels in the image */,
  "blackand" INTEGER /* Number of black and white pixels in the image */,
  "wb_trans" INTEGER /* White and black transition count in the image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image is public or private */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the image was modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the image (e.g., pending, processed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_image_type FOREIGN KEY ("image_type") REFERENCES image_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_image_format FOREIGN KEY ("image_format") REFERENCES image_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, uploader, viewer) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the image type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image type is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the image type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the image format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image format */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the image format is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the image format was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the tag is assigned to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_tags_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_processing" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the task is applied to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "task_date" TEXT /* Date the task was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the processing task (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the processing task */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the analytics data belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, recognition rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was generated */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model used for analytics */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the analytics data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analytics data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analytics_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analytics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analytics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "model_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., training, deployed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_data" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the training data belongs to */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used to train the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the training data was used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the training data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_testing_data" (
  "testing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing data entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the testing data belongs to */,
  "testing_data" TEXT /* Testing data used to test the model */,
  "testing_date" TEXT /* Date the testing data was used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the testing data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the testing data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_testing_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_testing_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the result belongs to */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Result data from testing the model */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the results */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role is assigned to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access control entry was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access control entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being requested */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., access, processing) */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the request was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the request */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status entry for the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_requests_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_requests_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_requests_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES request_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request the status belongs to */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_status_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES image_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_status_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
